name: list_orders
description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders from the BigCommerce store. Supports filtering by status, customer ID, date ranges, and minimum/maximum totals. Returns order details including items, shipping, and payment info.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of orders to return per page (max 250, default 50).

parameters.name: status_id
parameters.description: Filter by order status ID (0=Incomplete, 1=Pending, 2=Shipped, 5=Cancelled, 10=Completed, 11=Awaiting Fulfillment, 12=Manual Verification Required).

parameters.name: min_date_created
parameters.description: Minimum creation date filter (RFC 2822 or ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: max_date_created
parameters.description: Maximum creation date filter (RFC 2822 or ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: min_total
parameters.description: Filter orders with total greater than or equal to this value.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort results by: 'date_created', 'id', or 'total'. Prefix with '-' for descending.
